snippet.title: Animate to height: auto
snippet.description: The holy grail of CSS animation. Smoothly transition between a fixed size and an intrinsic keyword like auto . No JavaScript measurement needed.
snippet.demoMarkup: This content has no fixed height. The browser calculates auto height and smoothly transitions to it. For years this needed JavaScript to measure offsetHeight and animate. With interpolate-size: allow-keywords, it's just CSS. Works with auto, min-content, max-content, and fit-content. Set it on :root to enable everywhere.
